jobs.name: OpenClaw Daily Tip
jobs.description: Daily tip about OpenClaw apps, integrations, and use-cases

payload.message: Give one practical tip about an OpenClaw app, integration, or use-case that the user should try. Include step-by-step installation/implementation instructions. Make it actionable and concise. Rotate through different categories: automations, integrations, voice features, memory/notes, browser control, messaging, and creative use-cases.
